text: public class Main{ public static void main ( String[ ] args ){ Iluses a Math operator double number = 54.565; Jlround to 2 decimal places double answerl = Math.round(number * 100.0)/100.0 ; Jlround to 1 decimal places double answer2 = Math.round(number * 10.0)/10.0 ; Jlround to 0 decimal places double answer3 = Math.round(number); Jloutput answers System.out.println("the answer is "' + answer1); System.out.println("the answer is "' + answer2); System.out.println("the answer is "' + answer3); } }
